description: Every war comes to an end, but some end sooner than others. This course analyzes why and how conflicts come to an end, discussion relevant theories of conflict and conflict resolution, and important cases. Not open to students with credit for POLI SCI 378 prior to fall 2017

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Sophomore standing and (POLI SCI 140orINTL ST 101) or (POLI SCI 103 taken prior to fall 2017) or graduate standing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Sophomore standing and (POLI SCI 140orINTL ST 101) or (POLI SCI 103 taken prior to fall 2017) or graduate standing
